archive_data.question_text: ______ is the writer of the book 'India Wins Freedom'.

explanation.english: Maulana Abul Kalam Azad wrote the book 'India Wins Freedom' which describes the Indian independence movement.
explanation.tanglish: 'India Wins Freedom' noolai Maulana Abul Kalam Azad ezhuthinaar. Idhu Indian swathanthra poratta varalarai surungiya nool.

archive_data.question_text: _____ accounts for the difference between the concept of market price and factor cost in national income measurement.

explanation.english: Market Price equals Factor Cost plus Net Indirect Taxes. Net Indirect Taxes is calculated as Indirect Taxes minus Subsidies.
explanation.tanglish: Market Price-um Factor Cost-um net indirect taxes (indirect taxes kurippu subsidies) alavuku matravikkum.

archive_data.question_text: Madan Singh Chauhan, also known as 'Guruji', is a folk and Sufi singer from ___________________.

explanation.english: Madan Singh Chauhan, popularly known as 'Guruji', is a renowned folk and Sufi singer from Chhattisgarh.
explanation.tanglish: Madan Singh Chauhan (Guruji), Chhattisgarh maavattathukku uriya prasiddhamana folk matrum Sufi paadalgaar.

archive_data.question_text: Which Article of the Indian Constitution mentions that the laws inconsistent with or in derogation of the fundamental rights will be void?

explanation.english: Article 13 of the Indian Constitution declares that any law inconsistent with or in derogation of fundamental rights shall be void.
explanation.tanglish: Indian arasiyalachaattathin Article 13, moola urimaigalukku edhiraaga amaikkappatta sattangal invalid endru solgirathu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following was the last Five-Year Plan in India before its replacement with NITI Aayog?

explanation.english: The 12th Five-Year Plan (2012-2017) was the last five-year plan before NITI Aayog replaced the Planning Commission in 2015.
explanation.tanglish: 12th Five-Year Plan (2012-2017) thaan NITI Aayog varum munbu iruntha kadaisi aindhu aandu thittam.

archive_data.question_text: Pillared Verandah and cells are integral parts of which of the following Buddhist structures?

explanation.english: Ajanta Caves are famous for their pillared verandahs and monastery cells which are characteristic features of Buddhist rock-cut architecture.
explanation.tanglish: Ajanta Caves-il ulla pillared verandahs matrum Buddhist viharas (cells) ivai Buddhist kalai architectur-il mukyamaan amsaangal.
